sections.paragraph:
- Original: σθενόω

- Transliteration: Sthenoo

- Phonetic: sthen-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to make strong, strengthen

a. of one's soul

- Origin: from sthenos (bodily vigour, probably akin to the base of G2476)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From σθένος sthenos (bodily vigor; probably akin to the base of G2476); to strengthen that is (figuratively) confirm (in spiritual knowledge and power): - strengthen.
